_note: CANONICAL HEIGHTS — the only legal source for height in any prompt (D7 gate). Muscle tiers change MASS, never height, except where this chart says so. Every turnaround sheet includes a scale guide pinned to these numbers. >>> USER: these are proposed defaults — adjust any number and tell Claude, the chart propagates everywhere. <<<
scale_guide_device: Each turnaround renders the character beside a plain matte-grey mannequin silhouette of stated height + faint horizontal grid lines; prompts say 'same height as the reference silhouette — muscle mass increases, height does NOT'.

dana-lane.rule: modest gain only — at T9 she is slightly shorter than or equal to Supraman standing; she 'towers' on the cover because he is slumped. NEVER giantess-scale.

dee-dee.rule: Destroya is big but human-scale; Dana at T9 visibly outmasses her — by MUSCLE, not height (1 inch difference).

pairwise_checks: T6 Dana vs Supraman: she is 4 inches SHORTER standing level
T9 Dana vs Supraman: within 1 inch of each other
T9 Dana vs T8 Destroya: ~1 inch taller, dramatically more massive
Any panel where a character exceeds ~1.15x another's chart ratio = height-drift reject
